supplier: Apex BioInnovations LLC (DBA Apex Peptide Sciences)

importRules.coaCrossAssignmentGuard: A COA/lot ID is bound to exactly one SKU; the loader must reject any COA or lot reused across SKUs.
importRules.applyPolicy: This import is NOT auto-applied to the live catalog. Non-COA facts land as supplier_reported (visible to Samuel, not members). Promotion to confirmed (member-displayable) requires (a) actual COA delivery and (b) a founder/counsel decision confirming document execution.

facts.exactValue: BPC-157 (15 amino acids, MW 1499.8); TB-500 (synthetic fragment of Thymosin beta-4, 43 amino acids, MW 4963.6)
5 mg BPC-157 / 5 mg TB-500 (10 mg total per vial)
Lyophilised sterile powder; 3 mL borosilicate glass vial with rubber stopper and flip-off seal
Store lyophilised at -20C +/-5C. Protect from light, moisture, and repeated freeze-thaw.
24 months from manufacture when stored at -20C. Retest at 18 months per stability protocol.
Ship on dry ice. Maintain -20C throughout transit. Validated insulated shipper with temperature logger.
Apex Fulfillment - Austin, TX. Orders processed within 1 business day.

facts.conflictNote: Product sheet marks 'Actual COA attached', but the actual COA file is not present in intake and page 3 of the signed PDF states the COA files were not included. conflict_inside_package.
